component.name: Pi 5 Hardware Monitor
component.summary: Raspberry Pi 5 hardware, power, clocks, storage, and system status monitor for Cockpit

description.p: Pi 5 Hardware Monitor is a Cockpit add-on for Raspberry Pi 5 systems. It provides a simple live view of thermal status, cooling, power and throttling, system summary, boot and device information, NVMe and SD card details, PCIe link status, voltages, clocks, and advanced Raspberry Pi firmware diagnostics.
It is designed for Raspberry Pi 5 systems and works well in ASL 3 environments. The interface also includes Show/Hide Sections so users can choose which monitor sections remain visible.
Some storage and firmware-related fields depend on runtime tools such as vcgencmd, smartctl from smartmontools, and nvme-cli being available on the system.
